title: Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy
use_when: Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy. Use when the user needs a product workflow for product strategy related to competitive advantage diagnostics and moat strategy. Trigger terms: strategy, competitive-advantage, moats, 7-powers.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
framework_fit: Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy fits Strategy work in the Strategize lifecycle when the user needs Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move without tying recommendations to the user's Strategize stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy as generic Strategy advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $competitive-advantage-diagnostics-and-moat-strategy to turn this competitive context into a decision-ready Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move.
examples.expected_artifact: Competitive Advantage Diagnostics and Moat Strategy strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
